purpose: Tracks the current official-tree comparison and convergence classification progress for codex/.

completed: The Codex subtree is integrated through 6e5a2d6b8d14 with the six documented retained seams; 48 later official commits await a dedicated sync branch.
All 79 currently local-only paths follow the classified seams; the 50 diverged paths require upstream-first replay during the next sync.
Profile lifecycle, encrypted credentials, authorization, durable approvals, Git workspaces, Run leases, browser DTOs, and event delivery are owned by apps/web.
The browser uses typed REST and authenticated WebSocket transport; Tauri, desktop sidecars, raw browser RPC, desktop release chains, and desktop build dependencies are absent.
Provider configuration, event payloads, model context and onboarding implementation live in dedicated TUI Provider modules; high-churn upstream parent files retain only narrow attachments.
The protocol ToolName implementation matches official Codex; Chat namespace flattening is isolated in codex-api.
Generated contracts reproduce without drift and the current binary passes the real app-server Capability Manifest smoke.

validation.chatTransportTests: 175 codex-api tests and 17 focused Core Chat tests passed
validation.providerTests: 26 Provider metadata, 57 Provider transport, 41 model-manager, 27 focused Core Provider, 5 app-server model-list tests, and the existing-Thread Provider hot-switch regression passed
validation.appServerTests: 981 app-server assertions passed across the full matrix and auxiliary-binary reruns; 19 latest thread-fork tests passed
validation.networkProxyTests: all 207 network-proxy tests passed across local-port and network-isolated runs; the new CLI sandbox cases are Linux-only and not applicable on the macOS validation host
validation.latestUpstreamTests: 159 login, 60 PathUri, 86 apply-patch, 24 Core turn-diff and 19 app-server thread-fork tests passed
validation.realAppServerSmoke: passed against the current locally built CLI; 18 capability declarations
validation.platformTests: frontend, Rust workspace, PostgreSQL integration, Profile restart, Provider isolation, Git Runtime, Run lease, two-organization security, and fake-server HTTP/WebSocket checks passed

progress.nextAction: Create a dedicated codex/sync-upstream-* branch for the 48 pending official commits, accept upstream structure first, then replay only the six retained seams and rerun the contract/provider matrix.
